data.title: Write failing integration tests for Figma REST API pull-back
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Write failing integration tests that validate the Figma REST API pull-back workflow end-to-end: URL parsing, PAT auth, JSON retrieval, schema mapping, merge algorithm, and sync orchestration.
**Why**: TDD — tests must fail (RED) before implementation begins to ensure implementation is driven by verifiable acceptance criteria.
**Scope**:
- IN: Integration tests for Figma URL parsing (multiple URL formats), PAT auth validation (200/401), REST API JSON response parsing, spatial-layout.json mapping, merge algorithm (added/removed/modified components), ID-linkage validation, file locking, tag preconditions
- OUT: Implementation code — tests only

## Done Definitions

- Tests must be run and confirmed failing (RED) before any implementation story begins. The failing run result must be recorded in a story note: .claude/scripts/dso ticket comment <test-story-id> "RED confirmed: <test output summary>"
- When this story is complete, integration tests cover: Figma URL parsing for /design/, /file/, /proto/ formats; PAT auth success and failure; JSON node tree to spatial-layout.json conversion for FRAME, TEXT, RECTANGLE, COMPONENT, INSTANCE node types; merge with designer-added, designer-removed (with COMPLETE spec warning), and designer-modified components; ID-linkage validation post-merge; file lock acquisition and TTL cleanup; design:awaiting_review tag precondition check

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
